title: coleus floribundus
intro: Coleus floribundus, also known as the coleus or butterfly flower, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coleus floribundus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as an herbal tea or used in traditional medicine, with some herbal preparations also incorporating it into capsules or tinctures for convenience.
